title: lagerstroemia subcostata
intro: Lagerstroemia subcostata, also known as the Chinese crepe myrtle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lythraceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves and flowers are believed to have health benefits such as lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and improving digestion. Lagerstroemia subcostata is typically used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to promote overall health and well-being.
